sarah
yes, i will. here's the one issue: there is a talk that i must go to at
4p....actually, could be of interest to jeffrey...it is a guy named ed
hagen who does evolutionary stuff on disease like martin, is a
post-doc/prof in germany with hammerstein who is a friend of martin's.
...game theory guy. in any case, his talk is at 4-515p or so. i then
have to go to dinner at around 6p. so i could meet at around 515 or so
until about 6p. would that work?
marc
